features: 【Size】There are 4pcs large red Christmas gift bags,each bag measures 41*30*18cm.It's big enough to hold presents of any size.

【Red Gold】The red Xmas handbag is printed with golden stars, Christmas trees, gift boxes and other Christmas-related patterns. These Christmas elements form a circle, and "Merry Christmas" is very conspicuous in the middle.

【Premium quality】Christmas tote bags are made of high-quality non-woven fabrics, which have a certain bearing capacity and are durable. This Christmas packing bag has a waterproof coating on the surface, so it is easy to clean even if it is dirty.

【Wide application】Although this gift bag is a Christmas theme, it does not affect daily use at all. You can not only use this gift bag as a shopping bag, but also store clothes, blankets and toys in it.

【Merry Christmas】Christmas non-woven bags are very perfect for Christmas party decorations and used to hold Christmas gifts of various sizes. Moreover, such a beautiful handbag is also suitable as a Christmas gift for your friends and family.
description: Product Description Welcome to my shop! This Xmas, you don't need to worry about wrapping. Our products are filled with festive joy atmosphere! Welcome to shop in our store. When family members receive the gifts packed in this xmas gift tote bag, they will be very happy. This reusable non-woven bag with handles can also be given as a gift to family members and friends during the Christmas party. Its traditional colors fit the holiday atmosphere, showing respect and warmth. Product Details show 4 pcs There are 4 pack christmas tote bags inside, meeting your gift-giving needs. Large size-41×30×18cm The capacity of the gift bag is very sufficient, and it can easily hold snacks, clothes, scarves, gloves and other items. High quality tote bag The handle rope is made of thick cotton rope, which is tight and flexible. The tote bag is firm and not soft, and the bag body is not easy to deform. Exquisite decorative items Placing it in a corner of your home as a decoration is also a very good choice. Red christmas tote bag Green tote bag whth handles Green exudes a sense of mystery and sophistication, and looks very distinctive. Two options: red and green! So exquisite! Red symbolizes the warmth and joy of Christmas. Whether given to friends, colleagues or clients, it can convey a strong festive blessing.
